subcodes.title: Words to Sigurd Russell et al, spoken on 1904-04-14
subcodes.first_line: Their glory is but temporal and mortal, for they are but rulers of this ephemeral sphere, where all things change from day to day
subcodes.subjects: @Mary Magdalene, @high station of the true believer, @status of kings; future of monarchy, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world, @greatness and influence of the Cause; of this Day
